column3:
A repair mask that gives you your hair back

A weekly repair mask that restores your hair's ability to hold onto moisture, so it stays soft, strong, and manageable. Not just on wash day, but consistently.

Powered by polyglutamic acid, a humectant 5x more hydrating than hyaluronic acid, that floods the hair shaft with deep moisture. Ceramides seal the cuticle gaps where that moisture escapes, so more goes in and less comes out. The result is hair that's softer, stronger, and back to its best.

Strengthen, smooth, and hydrate - without the weight!

The Hyaluronic Acid Repairing Conditioner is a high-performance, protein-enriched formula that restores moisture balance, strengthens weakened strands, and smooths the cuticle. Infused with biomimetic peptides, omega-rich botanical oils, and hyaluronic acid, it penetrates deep into the hair shaft to repair structural gaps and lock in hydration.

Unlike silicone-heavy conditioners that just coat the surface, this lightweight formula nourishes from within—delivering long-lasting smoothness, frizz control, and real repair.

Your targeted relief duo for flakes, itch, and flare-ups.

The Scalp Treatment + Serum Duo is your intensive care set for dandruff-prone, irritated scalps. Use the Dandruff Detox Pre-Wash Treatment to exfoliate buildup, unclog follicles, and clear stubborn flakes. After shampooing and conditioning as usual, apply the Daily Calming Leave-On Serum directly to itchy, red, or flaky spots for lasting comfort and repair.

Formulated with a powerful AHA-BHA Complex, Magnesium, Cica, and Ashwagandha, this combo works both pre-wash and post-wash to target the root cause of dandruff—not just the symptoms.

Exfoliate. Soothe. Defend. Scalp relief that starts before the shower—and lasts long after.

A shampoo refill pack is an eco-friendly way to replenish your existing bottle without buying a new one. The Moxie Beauty Gentle Cleansing Shampoo Refill Pouch helps cut down on plastic waste while giving your scalp and hair the same gentle, effective cleanse, no new bottle needed.
Yes and there's a specific number to back it up. The refill pouch uses 90.1% less plastic than buying the equivalent amount of shampoo in individual bottles. For anyone in Indian cities where single-use plastic adds up fast, switching to a refill format is the simplest sustainability swap your routine can make without changing anything about how your wash day actually works. Same sulphate-free Gentle Cleansing Shampoo, significantly less waste every time.
The Gentle Cleansing Shampoo Refill Pouch refills the original bottle 2.5 times, so you're getting significantly more washes per purchase compared to buying individual bottles each time. Exactly how many washes depends on your hair length and how much you use per wash, but the refill format is designed to keep your routine going for longer without the constant restock. Less time thinking about running out, more time actually having good wash days.
The refill pouch is designed for home use rather than travel. It's a larger format meant to restock your bottle at home rather than go in your carry-on. For travel, the Moxie Travel Pouch and travel-size products are the better fit. The refill format works best as your home base, keep the bottle stocked at home, and pack a travel size for trips so your routine stays consistent wherever you are.
Yes. The sulphate-free Gentle Cleansing Shampoo is formulated to cleanse effectively without relying on harsh lathering agents that hard water disrupts. In Indian cities where hard water is the norm, sulphate-free shampoos tend to perform more consistently than sulphate-heavy formulas, which can react with mineral deposits and leave hair feeling dull or rough after washing.

Fine hair receives the strengthening and nourishing benefits without any of the flatness or greasiness that puts most people off hair oiling in the first place.
Yes. Oil Mighty Strengthening Hair Oil is safe for colour-treated hair. The Weightless Leave-In Conditioner hydrates hair and helps manage frizz while enhancing natural wave definition. Unlike regular conditioner, it stays in the hair after washing to provide lightweight moisture and smoother texture without weighing waves down. It is also colour-safe, making it suitable for regular use.
Apply the Weightless Leave-In Conditioner to damp, towel-dried hair after washing to lock in moisture and support wave definition. Focus on the mid-lengths and ends, and avoid the roots so the hair stays light, soft, and naturally voluminous.
Yes, leave-in conditioner helps hydrate wavy hair and manage frizz while enhancing the natural wave pattern. Using the Weightless Leave-In Conditioner after washing adds lightweight moisture and helps waves look softer, more defined, and naturally textured.
Both serve different purposes. A regular conditioner hydrates and detangles hair during washing and is rinsed out afterwards. A leave-in conditioner like the Weightless Leave-In Conditioner provides lightweight moisture after washing and helps fight frizz while enhancing wave definition, making it a useful finishing step for wavy hair routines.
A common mistake is using too much leave in conditioner. Although the Weightless Leave-In Conditioner is lightweight, a little goes a long way, so start with a small amount and add more only if needed. Another mistake is applying it to the scalp; instead, focus on the mid-lengths and ends for the best results.

5. Air-dry or use a diffuser - avoid touching hair as it dries to prevent frizz.

The Flexi Styling Serum Gel is a lightweight styling product with a unique serum-gel formulation that combines the hydration of a serum with the hold of a gel. It helps manage frizz and define waves or curls while keeping hair soft, flexible, and natural without stiffness or crunch.
A styling gel helps define waves or curls while keeping hair in place with flexible hold. The Flexi Styling Serum Gel helps lock in moisture, manage frizz, and enhance natural texture, giving curls and waves a soft, defined finish without making the hair feel heavy or sticky.
Yes, hair styling gel is safe when formulated with gentle ingredients. Moxie’s Flexi Styling Serum Gel is free from sulphates, parabens, and silicones, making it suitable for regular use. It is also colour-safe, vegan, and cruelty-free, helping manage frizz and define curls without weighing hair down.
Yes, the Flexi Styling Serum Gel is designed to be applied to wet or damp hair after washing. Applying it to wet hair helps distribute the product evenly, manage frizz, and enhance the natural definition of waves or curls during styling.
Use styling gel as the final step in your styling routine after applying Weightless Leave-In Conditioner. Applying the Flexi Styling Serum Gel to wet hair helps enhance wave or curl definition and manage frizz, creating soft, flexible hold that lasts throughout the day.

column60:
A good hair care routine for wavy hair starts with a moisturising shampoo and conditioner to cleanse gently while maintaining natural moisture. Follow this with a weekly hydrating treatment like the Deep Dive Hair Mask for deeper nourishment. After washing, apply Weightless Leave-In Conditioner and Flexi Styling Serum Gel to enhance texture, define waves, and minimise frizz.
Caring for wavy hair requires gentle cleansing, hydration, and lightweight styling to maintain natural definition. Wash with Gentle Cleansing Shampoo, follow with Ultra Hydrating Conditioner to soften and detangle, and style wet hair with Weightless Leave-In Conditioner and Flexi Styling Serum Gel. Pat dry with a microfibre towel, cotton T-shirt, or use a diffuser to minimise frizz.
Wavy hair becomes frizzy mainly due to dryness, damage, and friction during washing or drying. Manage frizz by cleansing with Gentle Cleansing Shampoo, conditioning with Ultra Hydrating Conditioner, and gently pat-drying with a microfibre towel or cotton T-shirt. Using a weekly treatment like the Deep Dive Hair Mask also helps restore moisture and smooth the hair cuticle.
A wavy hair routine should be followed every time you wash your hair, which is usually two to three times a week for most people. It’s a simple four-step routine cleanse, condition, style, and protect that helps maintain healthy waves. Leave-in stylers like Weightless Leave-In Conditioner and Flexi Styling Serum Gel enhance and hold the wave pattern after each wash. On non-wash days, you can refresh waves with dry shampoo or lightly dampen your hair and apply a small amount of Flexi Styling Serum Gel
No, combing wavy hair daily can disrupt the natural wave pattern and make hair appear frizzy or poofy. Instead, detangle your hair while conditioning in the shower using your fingers or a wide-tooth comb. Once styled, avoid brushing during the day to maintain wave definition and reduce frizz.
